creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for patch, but this is a development version. We already have it for 
about five weeks in our tree, MarcusCom CVS. If you want to help us with 
the GNOME development, please feel free to grab MarcusCom CVS and test the 
GNOME development. Also, feel free to send us any patch if we have missed to 
update one of ports in MarcusCom CVS. 

MarcusCom CVS: http://www.marcuscom.com:8080/cgi-bin/cvsweb.cgi/
